input.command:
echo "Validating typed output code: 3f9b7fa2"
echo "3f9b7fa2" | grep -qE '^[0-9a-f]{8}$' && echo "✓ VALID hex format" || echo "✗ INVALID hex format"

echo "Validating artifacts code: 3f9b7fa2"
echo "3f9b7fa2" | grep -qE '^[0-9a-f]{8}$' && echo "✓ VALID hex format" || echo "✗ INVALID hex format"

echo "Comparing codes..."
typed="3f9b7fa2"
artifacts="3f9b7fa2"
if [ "$typed" = "$artifacts" ]; then
  echo "✓ Codes match: IDENTICAL"
else
  echo "✗ Codes do NOT match"
  echo "  Typed:     $typed"
  echo "  Artifacts: $artifacts"
fi
